name: XM1014 | 旧宪章
descriptionEn: The XM1014 is a powerful fully automatic shotgun that justifies its heftier price tag with the ability to paint a room with lead fast. A tan-colored pattern of crests, scrawls, and text from the Magna Carta has been applied. Everyone is subject to due process—even you
descriptionZh: XM1014 是一把强大的全自动霰弹枪，其高昂的价格赋予了它高射速和室内清剿的能力。 这把武器的灵感来源于大宪章中的纹章、字迹与文字，用棕褐色演绎出设计的亮点。 法律不能使人人平等，但是在法律面前人人是平等的
